title: after the conv function processed, the conditional query returns incorrrectly
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```
create table lrr_test(`COL1` bit(1));
insert into lrr_test values(0x01);
select col1, conv(col1, 2, 16) from lrr_test where conv(col1, 2, 16) = conv(0x01, 2, 16);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
+------------+-------------------+
| col1       | conv(col1, 2, 16) |
+------------+-------------------+
| 0x01       | 1                 |
+------------+-------------------+


### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
Empty set

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v7.5.5
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: a0a8adb1e31bc1ff6fbb62a5bc4900e344877cd7
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-12-19 07:47:15
GoVersion: go1.21.13
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
poc: select col1, conv(col1, 2, 16) from lrr_test where conv(col1, 2, 16) = conv(0x01, 2, 16);
key_bug_features: conditional query returns incorrectly after conv function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE lrr_test2(`COL1` bit(1), `COL2` int, `COL3` varchar(10));
SELECT COL1, conv(COL1, 2, 16) FROM lrr_test2 WHERE conv(COL1, 2, 16) = conv(0x00, 2, 16);
SELECT COL1, conv(COL1, 2, 16) FROM lrr_test2 WHERE COL2 IS NULL OR conv(COL1, 2, 16) = conv(0x01, 2, 16);
